title: Open a Saved Pipeline in Atlas

sections.heading: Before You Begin
sections.body:
If you don't have a saved pipeline, you must first:

- [Create an Aggregation Pipeline](atlas-ui-create-agg-pipeline).

- [saved aggregation](atlas-ui-save-agg-pipeline).

sections.heading: Step 1: Click the folder  icon.
sections.body:
In the top-left corner of the pipeline builder, click the
Folder folder icon to open the drop-down menu of saved
pipelines.

sections.heading: Step 2: Select an aggregation pipeline.
sections.body:
In the drop-down menu, hover over the pipeline you want to open and
click **Open**.

sections.heading: Step 3: Confirm your selection.
sections.body: In the pop-up modal, click **Open Pipeline**.
